items.title: Gemini app: Gemini 3 Pro starts rolling out to everyone (higher limits on paid tiers)
items.why_it_matters: If you build or rely on Gemini in the app, this changes default model quality/limits without needing an API migration.
items.brief: Google says Gemini 3 Pro is rolling out to everyone in the Gemini app “starting today.”
items.details: Google’s Gemini Apps release notes state that Gemini 3 Pro is beginning a broad rollout to all users in the Gemini app, with higher usage limits for Google AI Plus/Pro/Ultra plans. This is an app-side model availability change (not necessarily the Gemini API). If you use Gemini for daily work, you should re-check model selection and limits because defaults may shift during rollout. Link is the official release notes page; the entry explicitly says “starting today.”

items.title: n8n full course (6 hours): building/selling AI automations + agents
items.why_it_matters: Practical, end-to-end agent automation training you can copy into real workflows (ops, lead gen, support, internal tools).
items.brief: A long-form n8n course dropped today focused on building AI automations/agents end-to-end.
items.details: A new long-form YouTube course covers n8n from basics through building AI automations and agent-style workflows. If you’re trying to operationalize LLMs, n8n-style orchestration is often the fastest path to production-ish integrations (webhooks, APIs, queues, CRMs). Skim for patterns: tool calling, retries, human-in-the-loop steps, and logging. Verify the exact modules you need before adopting any template wholesale.
